products.name: Nourishing Baby Bath & Shampoo
products.description: An ultra-gentle 2-in-1 bath and shampoo for babies' delicate skin and hair. Cleanses without disrupting the natural barrier.
products.how_to_use: Dilute in warm bath water or apply directly to wet hair and skin, lather lightly and rinse well.

products.name: Soft Baby Lotion
products.description: A silky baby lotion that keeps skin soft and comfortable all day. Formulated to support the developing skin barrier.
products.how_to_use: Massage onto baby’s skin after bath or whenever required, focusing on dry areas.
